---
title: "Early News"
page-layout: full
---
## Conference Presentations

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="25%"}
![](images/BHS_logo.png){width=200}
:::

::: {.column width="75%"}
**British Hip Society (BHS) — Olympia 2026**  

Title: *Ranking implant loading during high-impact exercises in people with total hip replacements*  

[Download the abstract (DOCX)](files/BHS_Abstract.docx)
:::
:::

## Pre-print Articles

* **Coming soon...**





{{< include _disclaimer.qmd >}}
